items.title: 'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded near Iran
items.dek: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.
items.body: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

items.title: UK MPs 'deeply troubled' by BBC World Service funding uncertainty
items.dek: The current funding agreement between the BBC and the government expires at the end of this month.
items.body: The current funding agreement between the BBC and the government expires at the end of this month.
